modules.title: Checklist
modules.short_description: Track routine checks without needing an account or network access.
modules.detail: Use a compact checklist for pre-work, handover, site, or delivery checks.

modules.title: Incident Notes
modules.short_description: Capture a private local note when something needs follow-up.
modules.detail: Incident notes are plain local text for internal memory, not reporting automation.

modules.title: Reference
modules.short_description: Keep a short local reference panel for repeated work reminders.
modules.detail: Reference cards help users remember routine steps without leaving the app.

modules.title: History
modules.short_description: Review recent activity in a calm chronological view.
modules.detail: Recent entries make it easier to confirm what happened during the session.

modules.title: Handover
modules.short_description: Prepare a concise end-of-session handover note.
modules.detail: Capture what is complete, what remains open, and what needs attention next.
